ideation: This sequence mimics the action of holding a telephone receiver to one's ear and speaking.  The animation will focus on bringing the right arm up to the ear, holding it there briefly, and then returning it to a relaxed position. The left arm will remain largely still for balance. The robot's lack of fingers means we'll focus on the overall positioning of the arm to suggest the action.  The movement will be smooth and deliberate, reflecting the seriousness of a phone call.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for the call
right arm lifts to the ear, listening intently
call ends, arm returns to rest
